answer:
MrScraper offers a free tier that includes 100 API tokens per month, which you can use for self-serve developer access [1]. No credit card is required to sign up for this plan [1][2].

To access the API, you must first generate an API token via the API Tokens section in your user profile [3]. You can then trigger your scrapers programmatically using the following endpoint [4][5]:

```
POST https://api.app.mrscraper.com/api/v1/scrapers-ai
Header: x-api-token: <YOUR_TOKEN>
Body: {
    "url": "https://example.com",
    "agent": "general",
    "message": "Extract data"
}
```

The free tier allows for 10 concurrent requests, though it does not include residential proxies or priority support [6][1]. Tokens reset at the beginning of each month [1].
